# `java-jpa`

Generates Java code for Spring Boot projects using [Spring Data JPA](https://spring.io/projects/spring-data-jpa) and the Jakarta EE persistence API.

## Install

```bash
daxonne add java-jpa
```

## Generated files (per table)

| Template | Output filename | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `entity.hbs` | `{Table}.java` | `@Entity` class with JPA annotations |
| `repository.hbs` | `{Table}Repository.java` | Spring Data `JpaRepository` interface |

## Example — `Customer.java`

```java
// Auto-generated by Daxonne — do not edit manually

import jakarta.persistence.*;
import java.io.Serializable;

@Entity
@Table(name = "CUSTOMER")
public class Customer implements Serializable {

    @Id
    @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.IDENTITY)
    @Column(name = "ID", nullable = false)
    private Long id;

    @Column(name = "FIRST_NAME", nullable = false)
    private String firstName;

    @Column(name = "LAST_NAME", nullable = false)
    private String lastName;

    @Column(name = "EMAIL")
    private String email;

    @Column(name = "BALANCE", nullable = false)
    private BigDecimal balance;

    @Column(name = "JOINED_AT", nullable = false)
    private LocalDate joinedAt;

    public Customer() {}

    public Long getId() { return id; }
    public void setId(Long id) { this.id = id; }
    // ... getters and setters for each field
}
```

## Example — `CustomerRepository.java`

```java
// Auto-generated by Daxonne — do not edit manually

import org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Repository;

@Repository
public interface CustomerRepository extends JpaRepository<Customer, Long> {
    // Spring Data JPA provides: findAll(), findById(), save(), deleteById()
}
```

## Type mapping

| Internal type | Java type |
|---|---|
| `string` | `String` |
| `int` | `Integer` |
| `long` | `Long` |
| `decimal` | `BigDecimal` |
| `bool` | `Boolean` |
| `date` | `LocalDate` |
| `datetime` | `LocalDateTime` |
| `bytes` | `byte[]` |
| `uuid` | `UUID` |
